name: Colin
description:
Okay y'all are not okay this is too much, anyways, I edited the first message and fixed some cringey writing I didn't like. Oh and also there's an open scenario now too!!!

I also feel like I should explain how I use this bot, but you can use it however you want!!! So, I make a Puro persona, but I narrates Colin's actions until he reaches the library, then I start speaking as the Puro himself!! I know, I know, narration POV bots are very niche, but I like em so fuck you. Oh and there's an open scenario now so you can do literally whatever you want :D

Uhm, this is getting outta hand, like, 50 thousand chats is a LOT, y'all really that horny for Colin?

Old me once said:

"I had made this for myself but I guess I kinda wanna make it public. Art by Ilistone on tumblr.

I made him 19 and waaay softer than ingame cuz I like soft bois -w-"
creator: Gokxs
